name: Ice Spire
notes: Winter Forge only — pre-seeded/fixed: never freshly built even after capture, but if destroyed it ruins like any other building and can be rebuilt at the usual ruin discount (rebuildCost default applies). Not a production or defensive building — pure aura structure carrying a slow debuff on nearby enemy troops. Winter Forge's Oil Rig boost is a separate base-wide bonus authored on the base definition itself, not an Ice Spire aura.
